creator: danilo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Does this port work with the default version of php (5.4)?
Using the default version as 5.5 I'm getting this error [1]:

Installing php5-5.4.29...pkg-static: php5-5.4.29 conflicts with php55-5.5.13 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/bin/php

[1] - https://redports.org//~daniloegea/20140703200500-2667-220726/dalmp-3.0.2.log
